hero.title: Check Any RERA Project's Trust Score

trustScore.title: How Trust Scores Work
trustScore.subtitle: Our proprietary 8-dimension scoring system rates every RERA project from 0 to 100
trustScore.deliveryDesc: Completion percentage vs timeline, deadline extensions, phase delivery
trustScore.documentsDesc: Required documents uploaded, QPR submissions, audit reports
trustScore.legalRiskDesc: Complaints filed, resolution rate, RERA orders against the project
trustScore.financialDesc: Bank account verification, financial statement submissions
trustScore.registrationDesc: Timely renewals, information completeness and accuracy
trustScore.builderHistoryDesc: Builder's track record across ALL their projects — unique to ReraPedia
trustScore.neighbourhoodDesc: Metro proximity, schools, hospitals, air quality index
trustScore.marketConfidenceDesc: Agent network activity, search interest trends, price movement

project.disclaimer: Data sourced from public RERA records. Verify independently before making investment decisions.
